html:
Exclusive to:

StarterFermentingFermentedSuper

“Adds 8-32 Growth Formula nutrient to the ground depending on its fermentation level.

Will also trigger Wormwoods bloom for 1 to 4 minutes depending on fermentation level.”

-for Growth Formula Starter

Growth Formula is an Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together and introduced in Reap What You Sow. The Growth Formula is used once to enrich Farm Soil with Growth Formula Nutrients. Once consumed, it returns one Empty Bottle.

Growth Formula becomes more potent the more fermented (spoiled) it becomes. After the full 3 days of spoilage, it becomes Super Growth Formula with 5 uses.

Like other items, it spoils faster when wet and slower if in a chest. If left floating in the Ocean, the Growth Formula will spoil faster.

Wormwood can use growth formula to trigger bloom for a short amount of time.


Fertilizer Name Uses Growth Formula
Nutrient 		Bloom
Growth Formula Starter 1 8 1 minute
Fermenting Growth Formula 1 16 2 minutes
Fermented Growth Formula 1 32 4 minutes
Super Growth Formula 5 32 4 minutes
DSTDSRoGSWHam

StarterFermentingFermentedSuper
“Now we wait for science to do its work.”
–Wilson, examining a Growth Formula Starter
“Gross.”
–Willow, examining a Growth Formula Starter
“Will be good drink for plants, make them strong!”
–Wolfgang, examining a Growth Formula Starter
“We nourish the plants' soil with the decomposed husks of their ocean cousins.”
–Wendy, examining a Growth Formula Starter
“THE NUTRIENT LEVEL IS UNSATISFACTORY. REQUIRES MORE PROCESSING TIME”
–WX-78, examining a Growth Formula Starter
“Kelp makes for an excellent fertilizer if prepared correctly.”
–Wickerbottom, examining a Growth Formula Starter
“Freshly bottled plant food.”
–Woodie, examining a Growth Formula Starter
“It looks more like a science experiment than a fertilizer.”
–Maxwell, examining a Growth Formula Starter
“A weak brew för the nön-meats.”
–Wigfrid, examining a Growth Formula Starter
“Wendy dared us to drink it...”
–Webber, examining a Growth Formula Starter
“Now to let the ingredients marinade.”
–Warly, examining a Growth Formula Starter
“Drink stuff, good for friends”
–Wormwood, examining a Growth Formula Starter
“Wouldn't want to take a sip of that stuff.”
–Winona, examining a Growth Formula Starter
“This kelp should help our garden grow, hyuyu!”
–Wortox, examining a Growth Formula Starter
“Look kinda tasty, florp.”
–Wurt, examining a Growth Formula Starter
“I think I'm supposed to let it sit for a while.”
–Walter, examining a Growth Formula Starter
“Hopefully this won't take too long.”
–Wanda, examining a Growth Formula Starter
“It's creating what we scientists call a chemical reaction!”
–Wilson, examining a Fermenting Growth Formula
“Yup, stuff's happening in there alright.”
–Willow, examining a Fermenting Growth Formula
“Stink getting stronger... will make plants stronger too!”
–Wolfgang, examining a Fermenting Growth Formula
“It's decomposing nicely.”
–Wendy, examining a Fermenting Growth Formula
“NUTRIENT LEVELS RISING”
–WX-78, examining a Fermenting Growth Formula
“It should sit for a while longer yet, to reach full potency.”
–Wickerbottom, examining a Fermenting Growth Formula
“Can't rush the brewing process.”
–Woodie, examining a Fermenting Growth Formula
“Wonderful, it's putrefying.”
–Maxwell, examining a Fermenting Growth Formula
“It's beginning tö take ön a pöwerful ödör.”
–Wigfrid, examining a Fermenting Growth Formula
“Is it going bad? Is that good?”
–Webber, examining a Fermenting Growth Formula
“It needs a bit more time to stew.”
–Warly, examining a Fermenting Growth Formula
“Getting better”
–Wormwood, examining a Fermenting Growth Formula
“This stuff sure takes a while to do its thing.”
–Winona, examining a Fermenting Growth Formula
“This planty drink is starting to stink.”
–Wortox, examining a Fermenting Growth Formula
“Good and stinky!”
–Wurt, examining a Fermenting Growth Formula
“Well, it sure looks like it's doing something.”
–Walter, examining a Fermenting Growth Formula
“This is taking an eternity!”
–Wanda, examining a Fermenting Growth Formula
“That stomach-churning smell means it's working!”
–Wilson, examining a Fermented Growth Formula
“Let's hope this works as well as it stinks.”
–Willow, examining a Fermented Growth Formula
“Is powerful plant drink with powerful smell!”
–Wolfgang, examining a Fermented Growth Formula
“It has the stench of death... and yet it brings life.”
–Wendy, examining a Fermented Growth Formula
“NUTRIENT LEVELS NEARING MAXIMUM OUTPUT”
–WX-78, examining a Fermented Growth Formula
“Quite acceptable, though it would be even better if I left it for just a bit longer.”
–Wickerbottom, examining a Fermented Growth Formula
“Now that's a strong brew!”
–Woodie, examining a Fermented Growth Formula
“Ugh, the smell... can we just put it in the ground already?”
–Maxwell, examining a Fermented Growth Formula
“By the göds, the stench!”
–Wigfrid, examining a Fermented Growth Formula
“It's gotten really rotten looking... yay!”
–Webber, examining a Fermented Growth Formula
“It's not my idea of a fine meal, but the plants will love it.”
–Warly, examining a Fermented Growth Formula
“Really good!”
–Wormwood, examining a Fermented Growth Formula
“That looks like some strong stuff.”
–Winona, examining a Fermented Growth Formula
“This bubbling brew will make the plants good as new.”
–Wortox, examining a Fermented Growth Formula
“Ready for plants now?”
–Wurt, examining a Fermented Growth Formula
“I'd guess it's just about done.”
–Walter, examining a Fermented Growth Formula
“That's good enough, isn't it?”
–Wanda, examining a Fermented Growth Formula
“That's some strong science!”
–Wilson, examining a Super Growth Formula
“Yeesh, plants actually like this stuff?”
–Willow, examining a Super Growth Formula
“Is ready to make plants mighty!”
–Wolfgang, examining a Super Growth Formula
“It's finished now.”
–Wendy, examining a Super Growth Formula
“OPTIMAL NUTRIENCE LEVEL ACHIEVED”
–WX-78, examining a Super Growth Formula
“Oh, the garden will enjoy this immensely!”
–Wickerbottom, examining a Super Growth Formula
“Yup, that right there's the good stuff!”
–Woodie, examining a Super Growth Formula
“It's reached the peak of its power... and its stench.”
–Maxwell, examining a Super Growth Formula
“Perhaps the nön-meats are strönger that I thöught, tö cönsume such a thing...”
–Wigfrid, examining a Super Growth Formula
“It smells done to us!”
–Webber, examining a Super Growth Formula
“Ah, c'est fini!”
–Warly, examining a Super Growth Formula
“Really-really good!”
–Wormwood, examining a Super Growth Formula
“I don't think it can smell any worse, must mean it's done!”
–Winona, examining a Super Growth Formula
“A most potent plant potion indeed!”
–Wortox, examining a Super Growth Formula
“It ready!”
–Wurt, examining a Super Growth Formula
“That's gotta be done!”
–Walter, examining a Super Growth Formula
“I think it's finally done.”
–Wanda, examining a Super Growth Formula
“Adds 8-32 Growth Formula nutrient to the ground depending on its fermentation level.
Will also trigger Wormwoods bloom for 1 to 4 minutes depending on fermentation level.”
-for Growth Formula Starter
Growth Formula is an Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together and introduced in Reap What You Sow.

Growth Formula becomes more potent the more fermented (spoiled) it becomes. After the full 3 days of spoilage, it becomes Super Growth Formula with 5 uses.
Like other items, it spoils faster when wet and slower if in a chest. If left floating in the Ocean, the Growth Formula will spoil faster.
Wormwood can use growth formula to trigger bloom for a short amount of time.

Will also trigger Wormwoods bloom for 1 to 4 minutes depending on fermentation level.| for Growth Formula Starter}} '''Growth Formula''' is an [[Item]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'' and introduced in ''[[Reap What You Sow]]''. The Growth Formula is used once to enrich [[Farm Soil]] with Growth Formula [[Nutrient]]s. Once consumed, it returns one [[Empty Bottle]]. Growth Formula becomes more potent the more fermented (spoiled) it becomes. After the full 3 days of spoilage, it becomes '''Super Growth Formula''' with 5 uses. Like other items, it spoils faster when wet and slower if in a chest. If left floating in the [[Ocean]], the Growth Formula will spoil faster. [[Wormwood]] can use growth formula to trigger bloom for a short amount of time.
